name: neohub
description: Plataforma integrada de colaboração e gerenciamento para a equipe Neo

scripts.serve:dev: node scripts/build-development.js && pm2 start scripts/ecosystem.config.js --env development
scripts.serve:prod: node scripts/build-production.js && pm2 start scripts/ecosystem.config.js --env production
scripts.deploy: npm run build:prod && pm2 restart neodeploy

author: Neo Team
